caption: Figure 2 : Figure 2: Samples generated from FigGen Base . We display two generated samples for three prompts Paper2Fig100k test set. Each row displays the classifier-free guidance (CFG) scale, showing that we can super-condition the generations to make the samples align better with the prompt.
sd_prompt: A detailed image generation prompt describing a scientific diagram on a white background in a professional style. The diagram shows five components arranged left-to-right, representing the Paper2Fig100k Test Set, Samples Generated, Classifier-free Guidance, and two generated samples for the test set. Each component is labeled and connected with arrows to show the data flow between them.
